body:
<!-- metadata:{"confidence":8} -->
P1: Plain model IDs now default to 128k context, which can miss compaction for small-window models (for example gpt-3.5) and cause context overruns.

<details>
<summary>Prompt for AI agents</summary>

```text
Check if this issue is valid — if so, understand the root cause and fix it. At packages/cli/src/modules/instance-ai/compaction.service.ts, line 34:

<comment>Plain model IDs now default to 128k context, which can miss compaction for small-window models (for example gpt-3.5) and cause context overruns.</comment>

<file context>
@@ -18,15 +23,32 @@ function estimateTokens(text: string): number {
-	return 128_000;
+	const raw = typeof modelId === 'string' ? modelId : modelId.id;
+	const slashIndex = raw.indexOf('/');
+	if (slashIndex < 0) return DEFAULT_CONTEXT_WINDOW;
+
+	const provider = raw.slice(0, slashIndex) as ChatHubLLMProvider;
</file context>
```

</details>

```suggestion
	if (slashIndex < 0) {
		for (const providerModels of Object.values(maxContextWindowTokens)) {
			if (providerModels[raw]) return providerModels[raw];
			for (const [registryModel, tokens] of Object.entries(providerModels)) {
				if (tokens > 0 && registryModel.startsWith(raw)) return tokens;
			}
		}
		return DEFAULT_CONTEXT_WINDOW;
	}
```

✅ Addressed in [`02056fd`](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/02056fdb36b840f465e970a7c1a299e0aefc00f8)

<details>

```text

Check if these issues are valid — if so, understand the root cause of each and fix them. If appropriate, use sub-agents to investigate and fix each issue separately.


<file name="packages/cli/src/modules/instance-ai/instance-ai.controller.ts">

<violation number="1" location="packages/cli/src/modules/instance-ai/instance-ai.controller.ts:541">
P2: When the static env API key is used, `validateGatewayApiKey` returns the sentinel `'env-gateway'` which is not a real user ID. All `sendToUsers` calls using this value will silently fail to deliver push notifications, so no browser client will receive `instanceAiGatewayStateChanged` events for env-key gateway connections. The old code used `broadcast` for this path. Consider either broadcasting when the userId is the sentinel, or documenting that env-key connections intentionally skip UI notifications.</violation>

<violation number="2" location="packages/cli/src/modules/instance-ai/instance-ai.controller.ts:546">
P1: Custom agent: **Security Review**

Timing-safe comparison regression: the old code used `timingSafeEqual` for pairing tokens and session keys, but `getUserIdForApiKey` delegates to `Map.get()` which uses non-constant-time string comparison (`===`). This removes a deliberate timing-attack mitigation for API key validation.

Consider implementing `getUserIdForApiKey` with `timingSafeEqual` by iterating over all stored keys with constant-time comparison, or maintaining the previous pattern of pulling the expected token by userId first and then comparing with `timingSafeEqual`.</violation>
</file>
```

</details>

<sub>Reply with feedback, questions, or to request a fix. Tag `@cubic-dev-ai` to re-run a review.</sub>

body: ## Pull request overview This PR fixes stale state and delayed aggregation issues in the “time saved” insights feature so UI checklist completion and dashboard insights update without requiring a full page reload or waiting for the hourly compaction job. **Changes:** - Frontend: Prefer `workflowDocumentStore.settings` over stale `props.workflow.settings` for checklist completion state (error workflow, time saved, MCP availability). - Backend: Extend `getInsightsSummary` to include uncompacted `InsightsRaw` data so recent executions appear in the dashboard sooner. - Tests: Add unit coverage for time-saved completion state sourced from the document store, and for raw insights inclusion in summary. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 4 out of 4 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | packages/frontend/editor-ui/src/app/components/WorkflowProductionChecklist.vue | Reads checklist completion state from the live workflow document store with fallback to props. | | packages/frontend/editor-ui/src/app/components/WorkflowProductionChecklist.test.ts | Adds a test ensuring time-saved completion is true when only the document store has the setting. | | packages/cli/src/modules/insights/insights.service.ts | Unions raw (uncompacted) insights into summary results to reduce dashboard staleness. | | packages/cli/src/modules/insights/__tests__/insights.service.test.ts | Adds a test verifying raw insights within the requested date range are included in time-saved summary. | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body: `getInsightsSummary` now calls `insightsRawRepository.find()` with no filters and then filters in memory. This can (1) pull *all* uncompacted raw rows into memory (performance risk) and (2) ignore the `projectId` filter entirely, which can mix insights across projects/tenants. Prefer querying aggregated raw insights in the DB with `timestamp` range + optional `projectId` (via join on metadata/metaId), e.g. `SUM(value)` grouped by `type`, and only for the requested date window.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body: New behavior prefers `workflowDocumentStore.value.settings.errorWorkflow` over `props.workflow.settings.errorWorkflow`, but there's no test asserting the checklist marks the item completed when the store has `errorWorkflow` and props are stale. Adding a test similar to the `timeSavedPerExecution` case would prevent regressions.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body: New behavior prefers `workflowDocumentStore.value.settings.availableInMCP` over `props.workflow.settings.availableInMCP`, but existing tests only cover the props-driven path. Add a test where `availableInMCP` is set in the document store while props settings omit it, and assert the MCP checklist item is marked completed.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
